title: Forex and Options Trading
description:
The course will provide  knowledge on risk in having forex exposure and how to convert the risk into opportunities.   It includes different type of Option strategies and their uses to minimize risk and increase the profit. Various technical terms used in Option trading and its significance in devising strategies during Option Trading. It also includes advance approach in Option Trading and its suitability in different scenarios in market. 
 The course will help in taking prudent decision in covering forex risk and converting it to opportunity.
